backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that composes access control, blob storage, invite links, and Stripe payment modules. Exposes public functions for invite code generation, RSVP submission, Stripe checkout session creation, and session status retrieval, all gated by admin permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (user registration with OTP, detailed user profiles, photo upload system, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key hooks/APIs used, and notable bug fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color system, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Matrimonial Platform', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, register, dashboard, admin, and services pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/Candidates: Admin UI component for managing candidate profiles with a searchable/filterable table, approve/reject/suspend actions, a modal to add new candidates directly via localStorage, and a profile view dialog showing photo counts.
frontend/src/components/admin/LockedChat: Admin component that displays a table of locked chats (auto-locked when contact info is detected) with metadata-only visibility and an unlock action button. Shows stats for total locked chats and contact-info violations while emphasizing that message content is never accessible.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentMon: Admin dashboard component that fetches and displays all platform payments with summary stats (total revenue, transaction count, chat unlocks, phone reveals) and a detailed transactions table with status badges.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ChatsS: User-facing chat section that gates messaging behind a ₹200 UPI payment from both matched users, then provides a real-time message interface with automatic chat locking when contact information is detected in messages.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Matche: User-facing matches section displaying candidate profiles with compatibility scores, like/reject actions, photo display, and a paid phone-number reveal feature requiring a ₹250 UPI payment.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Paymen: User-facing payments history component showing a summary of total transactions, total amount spent, and confirmed payments, along with a detailed transaction history table filtered to the current user.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Profil: React component for viewing and editing a user's matrimonial profile, including personal, professional, and family details, with photo upload/delete functionality and form state management.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer component displaying the Vivah Connect brand, contact info, quick navigation links, service pricing, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, and an authenticated user dropdown menu supporting logout, dashboard, and admin panel links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the React app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for auth, OTP, registration, profiles, photos, likes, matches, messages, payments, and phone reveals, backed by a localStorage data layer.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Lora, Inter), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a saffron/gold/ivory matrimonial color palette via CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus custom utility classes like `.card-matrimonial`, `.btn-saffron`, and `.profile-blur`.
frontend/src/lib/contactDetection.ts: Client-side utility that detects phone numbers, email addresses, and UPI IDs in message text using regex patterns, returning a `DetectionResult` indicating whether contact info was found and its type.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side utility that compresses an image `File` to a specified max width/height and JPEG quality using a Canvas element, returning the result as a `Uint8Array`.
frontend/src/lib/localStorage.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all app data models (UserProfile, Photo, Like, Match, Message, Payment, etc.) and provides CRUD helper functions for reading and writing each entity to `localStorage` using keyed JSON stores.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides shared utility functions: `cn` for merging Tailwind class names, `blurPhoneNumber` to mask middle digits of a phone number, and `detectContactInfo` to identify phone numbers, emails, or UPI IDs in a string.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` (React Query) and `InternetIdentityProvider` for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that checks if the current user has admin privileges and renders tabbed sections for Candidates Management, Payment Monitoring, and Locked Chats Monitor, showing appropriate access-denied or loading states otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard page that displays profile completion progress and tabbed sections for Profile, Matches, Chats, and Payments, with guards for unauthenticated or unregistered users.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page for the Vivah Connect matrimonial platform, featuring a hero section, feature highlights, step-by-step process, and testimonials with navigation links to register and services pages.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration form (4 steps) collecting phone/email OTP verification, personal details, education/career info, and family background, using custom query hooks for OTP and registration API calls.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static page displaying the platform's matrimonial service tiers with pricing (₹250–₹15,000), feature lists, badges, and a privacy/policy section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Lora, Inter), an extended color palette with saffron and gold scales using OKLCH values, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 5) for a privacy-focused AI-powered matrimonial platform built with React + Motoko, documenting architectural notes, known issues, and all existing/planned features.
